user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select a module and function for the import, so that the data is routed to the correct target entity
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Import Data screen; When I select a module and its corresponding function; Then the applicable import fields and mapping options are loaded

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to choose the file type and header format, so that the uploaded file is parsed correctly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring an import; When I choose a file type (Excel, Flat file, or Xml) and header format (First row or Not present); Then the system parses the file according to those settings

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to browse and upload a source file, so that I can bring external data into KensiumHR
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Import Data screen; When I browse and select a file and click Upload; Then the file is uploaded and its columns are available for mapping

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to map document fields to KensiumHR fields, so that each source column populates the right target field
acceptance_criteria: Given a file is uploaded; When I use Upload and Map to match document fields to KensiumHR fields; Then the mapping is applied to the import

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my mapping for further use or reuse a saved mapping, so that I avoid remapping on repeat imports
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured a field mapping; When I select Save mapping for further use or Use from saved mapping; Then the mapping is stored or loaded for the import

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to choose duplicate handling and process type, so that I control how conflicting or invalid records are treated
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring an import; When I select the type of import (Ignore or Overwrite duplicates) and process type (All valid records or No records if error occured); Then the import applies those rules

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to validate the file before importing, so that I can catch errors prior to committing data
acceptance_criteria: Given a file is uploaded and mapped; When I click Validate; Then the system checks the records and reports any errors before the final upload
